name: @in-falcone/workflow-worker
description: Falcone Temporal DSL interpreter worker. NOTE: this package deliberately does NOT declare "type":"module" — the Temporal TypeScript SDK's deterministic workflow bundler (@temporalio/worker / bundleWorkflowCode, Webpack under the hood) requires CommonJS workflow output and is incompatible with Node's native ESM loader. This is a hard SDK constraint, not a preference; see README.md (TypeScript / CommonJS deviation).
